info.title: autostep-cli
info.description: Command-line Interface for the AutoStep Test System

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: directory
options.description: Provide the base directory for the autostep project. [default: <path>]

options.name: option
options.description: Specify key/value pairs to override project configuration settings.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose execution, providing more execution detail.

options.name: diagnostic
options.description: Enables diagnostic verbosity level, providing internal execution details.

options.name: attach
options.description: Prompts for a debugger prior to project build.
